title: Extracted India indicators from Lancet Countdown 2025 data sheet

rows.label: Heatwave days per person
rows.interpretation: Exposure indicator, not a mortality count

rows.label: Heatwave exposure days not expected without climate change
rows.interpretation: Attribution/exposure indicator, not a mortality count

rows.label: Extra hours of moderate-or-higher heat stress exposure versus 1990-1999
rows.interpretation: Exposure indicator for moderate outdoor physical activity

rows.label: Potential labour hours lost due to heat exposure
rows.interpretation: Labour-capacity impact, not a mortality count

rows.label: Potential labour hours lost per person
rows.interpretation: Labour-capacity impact, not a mortality count

rows.label: Potential labour hours lost versus 1990-1999
rows.interpretation: Change relative to 1990-1999

rows.label: Agriculture share of heat-related labour-hour losses
rows.interpretation: Sector share of labour losses

rows.label: Construction share of heat-related labour-hour losses
rows.interpretation: Sector share of labour losses

rows.label: Potential income lost from heat-related labour capacity reduction
rows.interpretation: Economic impact, not a mortality count

rows.label: Deaths attributable to anthropogenic PM2.5 air pollution
rows.interpretation: Air-pollution mortality context; separate from heat mortality

rows.label: Deaths attributable to fossil-fuel PM2.5
rows.interpretation: Air-pollution mortality context; separate from heat mortality

rows.label: Deaths attributable to coal-related PM2.5
rows.interpretation: Air-pollution mortality context; separate from heat mortality

rows.label: Deaths attributable to coal PM2.5 from power plants
rows.interpretation: Air-pollution mortality context; separate from heat mortality

rows.label: Deaths attributable to petrol for road transportation
rows.interpretation: Air-pollution mortality context; separate from heat mortality

rows.label: Monetised value of premature mortality due to outdoor air pollution
rows.interpretation: Economic valuation context; separate from heat mortality

rows.label: Outdoor air pollution mortality value as share of GDP
rows.interpretation: Economic valuation context; separate from heat mortality

rows.label: Household air pollution mortality rate
rows.interpretation: Air-pollution vulnerability context

rows.label: Household air pollution mortality rate, rural
rows.interpretation: Air-pollution vulnerability context

rows.label: Household air pollution mortality rate, urban
rows.interpretation: Air-pollution vulnerability context

rows.label: Average dengue R0 by Aedes albopictus, 1951-1960
rows.interpretation: Climate-sensitive disease context, not heat mortality

rows.label: Average dengue R0 by Aedes albopictus, 2015-2024
rows.interpretation: Climate-sensitive disease context, not heat mortality

rows.label: Coastal area environmentally suitable for Vibrio transmission versus 1982-2010
rows.interpretation: Climate-sensitive disease context, not heat mortality

rows.label: People living less than 1 m above sea level
rows.interpretation: Climate-risk context, not heat mortality

rows.label: Cumulative tree cover loss
rows.interpretation: Cooling/adaptation context

metadata.note: Extracted from text layer. These are climate-health context indicators, not direct heat-mortality counts unless labelled otherwise.
